$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Binding Stage 1 decisions for the Phase 6A-6C amendment FFET package.

decisions.decision: Stage 1 is amendment seed-artifact work only.
decisions.rationale: The consolidated amendment separates Stage 1 amendments from Stage 2 runtime wiring.

decisions.decision: Stage 2 runtime integration remains separate and must be re-audited after Stage 1 lands.
decisions.rationale: The runtime wiring scope is defined in §5 and sequenced after Stage 1 seed-level readiness.

decisions.decision: The deferred semantic contract/package rename remains Stage 2 work.
decisions.rationale: Stage 0 explicitly deferred the contract/package namespace migration to avoid changing contract surfaces without consumers.

decisions.decision: No Spark Genesis is used for this package.
decisions.rationale: User instruction requires committed repo artifacts only unless explicitly requested.

decisions.decision: All execution flags remain false at Gate 2.
decisions.rationale: Gate 2 prepares human review; Gate 3 human approval is required before execution.
